End with STEP_OK if you see taskId, or FAILED: <reason>. IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the task completes. When revived, if the result shows status=failed or has no imageUrl, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>. If imageUrl is present, end with WAKEUP_OK.
